programme.title: Town Hall: Body Image in a Social World
programme.desc: Body image is a big deal and keeping up with everyone’s looks is a constant battle our young people confront on a daily basis. We’ll take a look at what steps kids and parents can take, and what help might be available for those struggling with body image.
